steps.title: Convert furlongs to yards
steps.content:
Each furlong is $220$ yards, so multiply the number of furlongs by $220$:
$$
372\cdot 220=81{,}840
$$
This gives $81{,}840$ yards.

steps.title: Convert yards to feet
steps.content: Each yard is $3$ feet, so multiply the yard total by $3$: $$ 81{,}840\cdot 3=245{,}520 $$ The answer is D.
